decisions: 2026-03-20: 2 PRDs — interface/factory/cache first, then concrete connectors
2026-03-20: Tier 1 providers = OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini (direct API keys)
2026-03-20: Tier 2 = ClassifAI integration (if active), WordPress AI API stub
2026-03-20: Model selection = hardcoded sensible defaults per provider, updated with plugin releases, filterable + custom model field for power users
2026-03-20: Free tier = not built-in; Groq etc. available via registration hook
2026-03-20: Failure fallback v1 = skip + retry on next cron, persistent admin notice after 3 consecutive failures for same release
2026-03-20: Registration hook = changelog_to_blog_post_register_providers for community-added providers

resume_hint: Writing PRD 1 of 2: AI Provider Interface
